translations.### AVPlayer 實踐本地 Cache 功能大全\n\n: ### Complete Guide to Implementing Local Cache with AVPlayer
translations.### 前導知識 (1)— HTTP/1.1 Range 範圍請求、Connec: ### Prerequisite Knowledge (1) — HTTP/1.1 Range Requests and Connection Keep-Alive
translations.### 前導知識 (2) — AVPlayer 原生是如何處理 AVURLAss: ### Prerequisite Knowledge (2) — How Does AVPlayer Natively Handle AVURLAsset Resources?
translations.#### ***如果發現伺服器不支援 Range、*** Keep-Alive: #### ***What if the server does not support Range or Keep-Alive?***
translations.#### AVQueuePlayer 切換播放項目時取消正在下載的項目\n\n: #### Canceling Ongoing Downloads When AVQueuePlayer Switches Playback Items
translations.#### 本篇只針對音樂小檔\n\n: #### This article focuses only on small music files
translations.#### 進入自訂的 Resource Loader 的時機點\n\n: #### When to Enter the Custom Resource Loader
translations.**Accept-Ranges: bytes** 代表伺服器支援 Range 範:
**Accept-Ranges: bytes** means the server supports Range requests.  
If the response lacks this value or shows **Accept-Ranges: none**, it means Range requests are not supported.
translations.**Content-Length:** 資源總長度，我們要知道總長度才能去分段要: **Content-Length:** The total length of the resource. We need to know the total length to request data in segments.
translations.**Content-Range: bytes 0–1/資源總長度** ，「/」後: **Content-Range: bytes 0–1/total resource length** — The number after "/" indicates the total resource length. We need to know the total length to request data in segments.
translations.**Content-Type:** 檔案類型，AVPlayer 播放時需要知道的: **Content-Type:** File type information required by AVPlayer during playback.
translations.**deinit 時取消所有還在請求的 requests**\nResource:
**Cancel all ongoing requests during deinit**  
Resource Loader deinit means AVURLAsset deinit, indicating the player no longer needs this resource; therefore, we can cancel any requests still fetching data, while already downloaded data will still be written to Cache.
translations.**使用 GET 我們能從 Response Header 得到以下資訊：**\: **Using GET, we can obtain the following information from the Response Header:**
translations.**使用 HEAD 我們能從 Response Header 得到以下資訊：**: **Using HEAD, we can get the following information from the Response Header:**
translations.**只有兩個方法需要實現：**\n\n: **Only two methods need to be implemented:**
translations.**知道伺服器支援 Range 範圍請求後，就能分段發起範圍請求：**\n\n: **Once you know the server supports Range requests, you can send segmented Range requests:**
translations.**補充：如果要考量大小寫可以寫 HTTPURLResponse Extensi: **Supplement: To handle case sensitivity, you can write an HTTPURLResponse Extension**
translations.*⚠️ **AVPlayer 會請求從 0-總長度 的資料，並透過實時取得已下載: *⚠️ **AVPlayer requests data from 0 to the total length, and obtains downloaded data in real-time chunks (**16 kb, 16 kb, 16 kb…) **Once it deems enough data is available, it will issue a Cancel to stop the network request** (so it usually doesn't download the entire file unless the file is very small).*
translations.*⚠️ **iOS ≤12 的情況下，會先發幾個較短的請求試著摸摸看（？然後才會: *⚠️ **For iOS ≤12, it will first send a few shorter requests to probe (?), then send a request for the total length; iOS ≥ 13 will directly request the total length.***
translations.*⚠️ requests 有的範例是只用 `currentRequest: Re: *⚠️ Some examples use only `currentRequest: ResourceLoaderRequest` to store the request, which causes an issue. The current request might be fetching data when the user seeks, canceling the old request and starting a new one; however, the order may not be guaranteed—it might start the new request before canceling the old one. Therefore, using a Dictionary to manage requests is safer!*
translations.*⚠️ 因 URLSession 會用並行方式出去請求資料，所以請保持操作都在D: *⚠️ Since URLSession makes requests concurrently, please ensure all operations run within a DispatchQueue to avoid data corruption (data corruption can cause severe playback glitches).*
translations.*⚠️ 在 AVQueuePlayer 中切換到下一個資源、AVPlayer 更: *⚠️ Switching to the next resource in AVQueuePlayer or changing the playback resource in AVPlayer does not trigger Cancel to stop the previous request.*
translations.*⚠️Data 合併有問題會出現可怕的播放鬼畜問題….*\n\n: *⚠️Data merging issues can cause severe playback glitches….*
translations.*⚠️讓所有操作都在同個 DispatchQueue 防止出現資料鬼畜。*\n\: *⚠️Perform all operations on the same DispatchQueue to prevent data glitches.*
translations.*⚠️這邊要注意伺服器給的格式大小寫，不一定是寫作 Accept-Ranges/: *⚠️ Pay attention to the case format provided by the server; it may not always be Accept-Ranges/Content-Range. Some servers use lowercase accept-ranges, Accept-ranges, etc.*
translations.*一個 Resource Loader 服務所有 AVURLAsset 在 AV: *Having one Resource Loader serve all AVURLAssets on an AVQueuePlayer becomes very complex and hard to manage.*
translations.*但比較建議使用 HEAD 去看，一方法比較正確，另一方面萬一伺服器不支援 Ra: *However, it is recommended to use HEAD to check. On one hand, this method is more accurate; on the other hand, if the server does not support the Range feature, using GET will force the full file to be downloaded.*
translations.*你可能有發現* `resourceLoaderRequestRange` *的: *You might have noticed* `resourceLoaderRequestRange` *offset is based on* `currentOffset` *because we first respond with locally downloaded data using* `dataRequest?.respond(with: Data)`; *so we just look at the updated offset directly.*
translations.*因為這邊是針對音樂做 Cache 檔案大小頂多 10 MB 上下，所以才能使用: *Because this is for music caching with file sizes around 10 MB, PINCache can be used as the local cache tool; for videos, this method cannot be used (as it may require loading several GB of data into memory at once).*
translations.*看到有範例是一個 **Resource Loader 服務所有 AVURLAs: *I saw an example where one **Resource Loader serves all AVURLAssets**, which I think is wrong. There should be one Resource Loader per AVURLAsset, following the AVURLAsset's lifecycle, as it inherently belongs to the AVURLAsset.*
translations.*繼續播放後才會透過 Range 往後請求資料。*\n\n: *Only after playback continues will data be requested later via Range.*
translations.*那也不用搞這麼多了，直接自己用 URLSession 下載完 mp3 檔案塞給: *Then there's no need to do all this; just download the mp3 file using URLSession and feed it to the player directly... But this is not the result we want. We can ask the backend to help modify the server settings.*
translations.*️️⚠️URLSession 沒有呼叫 `finishTasksAndInva: *️️⚠️If URLSession does not call either `finishTasksAndInvalidate` or `invalidateAndCancel`, it will strongly retain objects causing a memory leak; therefore, whether canceling or completing, we must call one of these to release the request when the task ends.*
translations.*️️⚠️️️️️️️️️️️如果怕 `downloadedData` OOM，: *️️⚠️️️️️️️️️️If you worry about `downloadedData` causing OOM, you can save it locally within didReceive Data.*
translations.*（這部分跟我之前想的不一樣，我以為會是0–100、100–200..這樣請求）: * (This part is different from what I thought before; I assumed the requests would be 0–100, 100–200, and so on)*
translations.- **Accept-Ranges: bytes** means the ser:
- **Accept-Ranges: bytes** means the server supports Range requests.  
  If the response lacks this value or shows **Accept-Ranges: none**, it means Range requests are not supported.

- **Content-Length:** The total length of the resource. We need to know the total length to request data in segments.

- **Content-Type:** File type information required by AVPlayer during playback.

- **Accept-Ranges: bytes** means the server supports Range requests.  
  If the response lacks this or shows **Accept-Ranges: none**, it means Range requests are not supported.

- **Content-Range: bytes 0–1/total resource length** — The number after "/" indicates the total resource length. Knowing the total length is necessary to request data in segments.

- **Content-Type:** File type information required by AVPlayer during playback.
translations.- Custom Cache Strategy, you can use PIN:
- Custom Cache Strategy, you can use PINCache or others…

- Externally, just call the make AVAsset factory with a URL, and the AVAsset will support caching.

- Implementing Data Flow Strategy with Combine

- Wrote some tests
translations.- Played music will generate a local Cac:
- Played music will generate a local Cache backup

- Check local Cache before playing music; if available, do not request the file from the server again.

- Cache strategy can be set; when the total capacity limit is exceeded, the oldest cache files will be deleted.

- Do Not Interfere with the Original AVPlayer Playback Mechanism  
  (The fastest way would be to download the mp3 first using URLSession and then feed it to AVPlayer, but this loses the original on-demand streaming feature. Users would have to wait longer and consume more data.)
translations.- `contentInformation` : AssetDataConten:
- `contentInformation` : AssetDataContentInformation  
  `AssetDataContentInformation` :  
  Stores whether Range requests are supported (isByteRangeAccessSupported), total resource length (contentLength), and file type (contentType)

- `mediaData` : Original audio Data **(Large files here may cause OOM)**
translations.- `isByteRangeAccessSupported`: Check if:
- `isByteRangeAccessSupported`: Check if the Response Header contains **Accept-Ranges == bytes**

- `contentType`: The file type information required by the player, formatted as a Uniform Type Identifier (UTI), not audio/mpeg but written as public.mp3

- `contentLength`: Check the **Content-Range** in the Response Header: bytes 0–1/ **total resource length**
translations.- `loadingRequest.contentInformationRequ:
- `loadingRequest.contentInformationRequest?.isByteRangeAccessSupported`: Whether Range requests for data are supported

- `loadingRequest.contentInformationRequest?.contentType`: Uniform Type Identifier

- `loadingRequest.contentInformationRequest?.contentLength`: Total file length Int64
translations.- contentLength = response.parseContentL:
- contentLength = response.parseContentLengthFromContentRange()

- isByteRangeAccessSupported = response.parseAcceptRanges()  // Check if the server supports byte-range requests

- contentType = response.mimeTypeUTI()
translations.- func resourceLoader(_ resourceLoader:: - func resourceLoader(_ resourceLoader: AVAssetResourceLoader, didCancel **loadingRequest** : AVAssetResourceLoadingRequest) :
- func resourceLoader(_ resourceLoader: AVAssetResourceLoader, shouldWaitForLoadingOfRequestedResource **loadingRequest** : AVAssetResourceLoadingRequest) -> Bool :
translations.1. The second request mentioned earlier:
1. The second request mentioned earlier requests the resource from 0 to the total length. Once enough data is received, it will initiate a Cancel to stop the request.

2. When seeking, a Cancel request is first sent to cancel the previous request.
translations.1. [iOS AVPlayer Video Cache Design and:
1. [iOS AVPlayer Video Cache Design and Implementation](http://chuquan.me/2019/12/03/ios-avplayer-support-cache/){:target="_blank"} Theory Only

2. [Implementing Audio and Video Playback with AVPlayer and Caching, Supporting Synchronized Video Output](https://caisanze.com/post/swift-avplayer/){:target="_blank"} [ [SZAVPlayer](https://github.com/eroscai/SZAVPlayer){:target="_blank"} ] includes code (very complete but complex)

3. [CachingPlayerItem](https://github.com/neekeetab/CachingPlayerItem/blob/7d998b8561693cf51077f0891ed240e92bec415e/CachingPlayerItem.swift){:target="_blank"} (Simple implementation, easier to understand but incomplete)

4. [Possibly the Best AVPlayer Audio and Video Caching Solution AVAssetResourceLoaderDelegate](https://www.jianshu.com/p/28157247d6a7){:target="_blank"}

5. [Douyin Swift Version](https://sshiqiao.github.io/document/douyin-swift.html#1){:target="_blank"} [ [Github](https://github.com/sshiqiao/douyin-ios-swift){:target="_blank"} ] (An interesting project that recreates the Douyin app; it also uses Resource Loader)

6. [iOS HLS Cache Implementation Exploration Journey](../d796bf8e661e/)

translations.> > @[zhgchgli](https://twitter.com/zhgc: > > @[zhgchgli](https://twitter.com/zhgchgli) If AssetData.mediaData fetches a 5GB 4K HDR video, it will still cause OOM, right? Also, to be cautious, you should check Accept-Ranges before requesting Content-Range.

> > @[zhgchgli](https://twitter.com/zhgchgli) The traditional conservative approach is using FileHandle. I wrote about 200 lines of Swift to handle this, and its seek and read/write effectively prevent OOM during read/write operations. For the logic of responding to data requests, you can refer to segment tree related problems on LeetCode, such as [leetcode.com/problems/range…](https://leetcode.com/problems/range-module/)
translations.> @[zhgchgli](https://twitter.com/zhgchg: > @[zhgchgli](https://twitter.com/zhgchgli) If AssetData.mediaData fetches a 5GB 4K HDR video, it will still cause OOM, right? Also, to be cautious, you should check Accept-Ranges before requesting Content-Range.

> @[zhgchgli](https://twitter.com/zhgchgli) The traditional conservative approach is using FileHandle. I wrote about 200 lines of Swift to handle this, and its seek and read/write effectively prevent OOM during read/write operations. For the logic of responding to data requests, you can refer to segment tree related problems on LeetCode, such as [leetcode.com/problems/range…](https://leetcode.com/problems/range-module/)
translations.@[zhgchgli](https://twitter.com/zhgchgli: @[zhgchgli](https://twitter.com/zhgchgli) If AssetData.mediaData fetches a 5GB 4K HDR video, it will still cause OOM, right? Also, to be cautious, you should check Accept-Ranges before requesting Content-Range.

@[zhgchgli](https://twitter.com/zhgchgli) The traditional conservative approach is using FileHandle. I wrote about 200 lines of Swift to handle this, and its seek and read/write effectively prevent OOM during read/write operations. For the logic of responding to data requests, you can refer to segment tree related problems on LeetCode, such as [leetcode.com/problems/range…](https://leetcode.com/problems/range-module/)
translations.AVURLAsset 是 weak 持有 ResourceLoader Dele: AVURLAsset holds the ResourceLoader Delegate weakly, so it is recommended to create a custom AVURLAsset subclass. Inside, instantiate, assign, and retain the ResourceLoader to tie it to the AVURLAsset lifecycle. You can also store the original URL, CacheKey, and other related information.
translations.Cache 的部分我直接使用 [PINCache](https://github: For caching, I directly use [PINCache](https://github.com/pinterest/PINCache){:target="_blank"}, delegating the cache management to it. This avoids dealing with cache read/write deadlocks and implementing the LRU cache eviction strategy ourselves.
translations.Hash 可使用 md5…sha..，iOS ≥ 13 可直接使用 Apple: Hash can use md5…sha…, on iOS ≥ 13 you can directly use Apple's [CryptoKit](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/cryptokit/){:target="_blank"}, otherwise just search on Github!
translations.PINCache 包含 PINMemoryCache 和 PINDiskCach: PINCache includes PINMemoryCache and PINDiskCache. PINCache handles reading from files into memory and writing from memory to files for us. We only need to interact with PINCache.
translations.Resource Loader 實際就是個打工仔，播放器是要檔案資訊還是檔案資料: The Resource Loader is essentially a worker; whether the player needs file info or file data, and which range, it tells us, and we just handle it.
translations.Seek 時會先發起 Cancel 取消先前的請求。\n: When seeking, a Cancel request is first sent to cancel the previous request.

translations.[基于AVPlayer实现音视频播放和缓存，支持视频画面的同步输出](https: [Implementing Audio and Video Playback with AVPlayer and Caching, Supporting Synchronized Video Output](https://caisanze.com/post/swift-avplayer/){:target="_blank"} [ [SZAVPlayer](https://github.com/eroscai/SZAVPlayer){:target="_blank"} ] includes code (very complete but complex)
translations.`PINCache(name: “ResourceLoader”)` 其中的 n: `PINCache(name: “ResourceLoader”)` where the name is the directory name.
translations.`RequestRange` ：請求 Range 範圍，end 可指定到哪(re: `RequestRange`: The requested Range, where end can be specified up to a certain point (requestTo(Int64)) or to the end (requestToEnd).
translations.`RequestType` ：用來區分此 Request 是 第一次請求檔案資訊: `RequestType`: Used to distinguish whether this request is the first request for file information (contentInformation) or a data request (dataRequest)
translations.```\n1. GET Range 0-1 => Response: 總長度 1:
```
1. GET Range 0-1 => Response: total length 150000 / public.mp3 / true
2. GET 0-150000...
3. 16 kb receive
4. 16 kb receive...
5. cancel() // current offset is 700
6. continue playing
7. GET 700-150000...
8. 16 kb receive
9. 16 kb receive...
10. cancel() // current offset is 1500
11. continue playing
12. GET 1500-150000...
13. 16 kb receive
14. 16 kb receive...
16. If seek to...5000
17. cancel(12.) // current offset is 2000
18. GET 5000-150000...
19. 16 kb receive
20. 16 kb receive...
...
```
translations.```swift\nfunc resourceLoader(_ resource:
```swift
func resourceLoader(_ resourceLoader: AVAssetResourceLoader, shouldWaitForLoadingOfRequestedResource loadingRequest: AVAssetResourceLoadingRequest) -> Bool
```
translations.`cacheKey` 存放這個資源的 Cache Key，這邊直接用檔案名稱當: `cacheKey` stores the Cache Key for this resource. Here, the file name is used directly as the Cache Key.
translations.`cacheKey` 請依照現實場景做調整，如果檔案名稱未 hash 可能重複就: Adjust the `cacheKey` according to real scenarios. If the file name is not hashed and might cause duplicates, it is recommended to hash it first to avoid collisions. If hashing the entire URL as the key, also consider whether the URL may change (e.g., when using a CDN).
translations.`contentInformation` : AssetDataContentI:
`contentInformation` : AssetDataContentInformation  
`AssetDataContentInformation` :  
Stores whether Range requests are supported (isByteRangeAccessSupported), total resource length (contentLength), and file type (contentType)
translations.`contentLength` ：看 Response Header 中的 **: `contentLength`: Check the **Content-Range** in the Response Header: bytes 0–1/ **total resource length**
translations.`contentType` ：播放器要的檔案類型資訊，格式是統一類識別符，不是: `contentType`: The file type information required by the player, formatted as a Uniform Type Identifier (UTI), not audio/mpeg but written as public.mp3
translations.`isByteRangeAccessSupported` ：看 Response: `isByteRangeAccessSupported`: Check if the Response Header contains **Accept-Ranges == bytes**
translations.`loadingRequest.contentInformationReques: `loadingRequest.contentInformationRequest?.isByteRangeAccessSupported`: Whether Range requests for data are supported
If `loadingRequest.contentInformationRequest` != nil, it means this is the first request, and the player asks for the file information first.
translations.`loadingRequest.dataRequest?.currentOffs: `loadingRequest.dataRequest?.currentOffset` can get the current data offset. After `dataRequest?.respond(with: Data)`, the `currentOffset` will advance accordingly.
translations.`loadingRequest.dataRequest?.requestedLe: `loadingRequest.dataRequest?.requestedLength` can get the length of the requested Range.
translations.`loadingRequest.dataRequest?.requestedOf: `loadingRequest.dataRequest?.requestedOffset` can get the starting offset of the requested Range.
translations.`loadingRequest.dataRequest?.requestsAll: If `loadingRequest.dataRequest?.requestsAllDataToEndOfResource` == true, then regardless of the requested Range length, fetch until the end.
translations.`loadingRequest.dataRequest?.respond(wit: `loadingRequest.dataRequest?.respond(with: Data)` returns the loaded Data to the player.
translations.`loadingRequest.finishLoading()` 資料都載完了，: `loadingRequest.finishLoading()` indicates that all data has been loaded and notifies the player.
translations.`mediaData` : 原始音訊 Data **（這邊檔案太大會 OOM）*: `mediaData` : Original audio Data **(Large files here may cause OOM)**
translations.func resourceLoader(_ resourceLoader: AV: func resourceLoader(_ resourceLoader: AVAssetResourceLoader, didCancel **loadingRequest** : AVAssetResourceLoadingRequest) :
func resourceLoader(_ resourceLoader: AVAssetResourceLoader, shouldWaitForLoadingOfRequestedResource **loadingRequest** : AVAssetResourceLoadingRequest) -> Bool :
translations.http 1.1 預設是開啟狀態， **此特性能實時取得已下載的資料** ，例如: HTTP 1.1 is enabled by default, **this feature allows real-time access to downloaded data**. For example, a 5 MB file can be retrieved in 16 KB, 16 KB, 16 KB… chunks, without waiting for the entire 5 MB to finish downloading.
translations.isByteRangeAccessSupported = response.pa: isByteRangeAccessSupported = response.parseAcceptRanges()  // Check if the server supports byte-range requests
translations.不囉唆，先上完整專案：\n\n: No more talk, here is the complete project:
translations.不干涉原本 AVPlayer 播放機制\n（不然最快的方法就是自己先用 URLS:
Do Not Interfere with the Original AVPlayer Playback Mechanism  
(The fastest way would be to download the mp3 first using URLSession and then feed it to AVPlayer, but this loses the original on-demand streaming feature. Users would have to wait longer and consume more data.)
translations.中取得 Response Header，另外要注意如果要改 HEAD 去摸，不會: Obtain the Response Header here. Also, note that if you want to use HEAD requests, this method won't be triggered; you'll need to use other approaches.
translations.也可以指定 rootPath ，目錄就可以改到 Documents 底下（不怕被: You can also specify rootPath, so the directory can be changed to under Documents (not at risk of being cleared by the system).
translations.任務取消或結束時都會進這個方法，在這將已下載的資料保存下來。\n\n: This method is called whenever a task is canceled or finished. Here, the downloaded data is saved.
translations.但有時我們也會使用 GET `Range: bytes=0–1` ，意思是我要求: Sometimes we also use GET `Range: bytes=0–1`, meaning we request the data in the 0–1 range but actually don't care about the content of 0–1; we just want to check the Response Header information. **Native AVPlayer uses GET this way, so this article follows the same approach**.
translations.使用 Combine 實現 Data Flow 策略\n: Implementing Data Flow Strategy with Combine
translations.使用 `NSHomeDirectory()` 取得模擬器檔案路徑\n\n: Using `NSHomeDirectory()` to get the simulator file path
translations.其中 `isSchemeSupport()` 是用來判斷 URL 是否支援掛我們: The `isSchemeSupport()` function is used to determine whether the URL supports our Resource Loader (excluding file://).
translations.其他還可以同個請求要求多個 Range 資料及下條件式子，但我們用不到，詳情可: It is also possible to request multiple Range data and set conditions in the same request, but we do not use these features. For details, please [refer to this](https://developer.mozilla.org/zh-CN/docs/Web/HTTP/Range_requests){:target="_blank"}.
translations.其實也是同樣呼叫 Resource Loader 處理，只是他要求的資料範圍會比: It actually still calls the Resource Loader to handle it, but the requested data range is smaller.
translations.前述說到的 **Cancel 發起時機** 發起 Cancel 時…\n\n: The previously mentioned **Cancel initiation timing** When initiating Cancel...
translations.前面說到的第二次請求，請求從 0 開始 到總長度的資源，有足夠 Data 後會發: The second request mentioned earlier requests the resource from 0 to the total length. Once enough data is received, it will initiate a Cancel to stop the request.
translations.原先太小看這個功能的困難度，以為三兩下就能處理好；結果吃盡苦頭，大概又多花了兩週: I originally underestimated the difficulty of this feature, thinking it could be handled quickly; however, I ran into many troubles and spent about two more weeks dealing with data storage issues. But through this process, I gained a thorough understanding of the entire Resource Loader mechanism, GCD, and Data handling.
translations.另外也能在此做 Data 加解密操作，保護原始資料。\n\n: You can also perform data encryption and decryption here to protect the original data.
translations.另外因為 Android 那邊已經有實作邊播邊 Cache 的功能了，之前有比較: Additionally, since Android has already implemented streaming with caching, previous comparisons showed significant data savings after the Android version launched; similarly, with more iOS users, there should be even better data saving effects.
translations.另外，想拿完整檔案資料除了可以請求 Range 0-總長度，也可以使用 0- 方: Additionally, to get the complete file data, you can request Range 0 to the total length, or simply use 0- as well:
translations.可設 Cache 策略；上限總容量，超過時開始刪除最舊的 Cache 檔案\n: Cache strategy can be set; when the total capacity limit is exceeded, the oldest cache files will be deleted.
translations.同前導知識中所述，在更換播放目標時是不會發起 Cancel 的；如果是 AVPl: As mentioned in the previous knowledge, switching the playback target does not trigger a Cancel; for AVPlayer, it goes through AVURLAsset Deinit, so the download is also interrupted. However, AVQueuePlayer does not cancel because the items are still in the queue; it just switches the playback target to the next item.
translations.同前導知識所述，會實時取得已下載的資料，所以這個方法會一直進，片段片段的拿到 D: As mentioned in the previous context, the downloaded data is obtained in real-time, so this method is called repeatedly to receive data in segments; we append these segments into `downloadedData`.
translations.同前述，如果要解決這個問題請使用 fileHandler seek read/w: As mentioned above, to solve this issue, use fileHandler seek read/write to operate local Cache reading and writing (replacing AssetData/PINCacheAssetDataManager); or look for existing GitHub projects that handle large data write/read to file.
translations.圖片取自： [iOS AVPlayer 视频缓存的设计与实现](http://c: Image source: [iOS AVPlayer Video Cache Design and Implementation](http://chuquan.me/2019/12/03/ios-avplayer-support-cache/){:target="_blank"}
translations.在 Library -> Caches -> com.pinterest.PIN: In Library -> Caches -> com.pinterest.PINDiskCache.ResourceLoader is the Resource Loader Cache directory we created.
translations.在模擬器中查找 Cache 檔案位置：\n\n: Finding Cache File Location in the Simulator:
translations.外部只需呼叫 make AVAsset 工廠，帶入 URL，則 AVAsset: Externally, just call the make AVAsset factory with a URL, and the AVAsset will support caching.
translations.如前導知識中提到的 Cancel 機制，因播放器在拿到足夠資料後就會發起 Can: As mentioned in the pre-knowledge about the Cancel mechanism, the player will issue a Cancel or Cancel Request once it has enough data; therefore, when entering this method, the actual `error` will be `NSURLErrorCancelled`. Regardless of the error, if we have received data, we will still attempt to save it.
translations.如果拿的 Range 超過資源總長度會返回 416 Range Not Sati: If the requested Range exceeds the total length of the resource, a 416 Range Not Satisfiable response will be returned.
translations.如果要考慮非連續合併，除了在儲存上要使用其他方法（要有辦法辨識空缺部分）；在 R: If considering non-continuous merging, besides using other methods for storage (able to identify missing parts), the request must also be able to query which segments require network requests and which come from local cache. Implementing this scenario can be very complex.
translations.客製化 Cache 策略，可以用 PINCache or 其他…\n: Custom Cache Strategy, you can use PINCache or others…
translations.封裝 Data 存入、取出 PINCache 邏輯。\n\n: Encapsulate the logic for storing and retrieving Data in PINCache.
translations.就是之前有提到的 `AVAssetResourceLoaderDelegate`: This is the previously mentioned `AVAssetResourceLoaderDelegate` interface, which allows us to **implement our own Resource Loader** for the Asset.
translations.影片大檔案可能會在 downloadedData、AssetData/PINCa: Large video files may cause Out Of Memory issues in downloadedData and AssetData/PINCacheAssetDataManager.
translations.感謝 [Lex 汤](https://medium.com/u/2d01a243: Thanks to [Lex 汤](https://medium.com/u/2d01a2439753){:target="_blank"} for the great guidance.
translations.感謝 [外孫女](https://medium.com/u/aab116fd9d: Thanks to [granddaughter](https://medium.com/u/aab116fd9d4d){:target="_blank"} for providing development advice and support.
translations.我們可以在這去取消正在請求的 URLSession。\n\n: We can cancel the ongoing URLSession request here.
translations.我們會先使用 HEAD 去看 Response Header 了解到伺服器是否支: We first use HEAD to check the Response Header to understand whether the server supports Range requests, the total resource length, and the file type:
translations.我們能從 `loadingRequest` 取出要請求什麼（第一次請求檔案資訊還: We can extract from `loadingRequest` what is being requested (whether it's the first request for file info or a data request, and if it's a data request, the Range from-to). Once we know the request, we can initiate the request ourselves to get the data. **At this point, we can decide whether to start a URLSession request or return Data from local storage.**
translations.我將之前的實作開源了，有需求的朋友可直接使用。\n\n: I have open-sourced my previous implementation. Feel free to use it if you need.
translations.所以我們在將 URL 資源給予 AVURLAsset 之前要先將 Scheme: So before providing the URL resource to AVURLAsset, we need to replace the Scheme with our custom Scheme. It cannot be http/https or other system-handled Schemes.
translations.播放器請求資料，我們先看本地 Cache 有無資料，有則返回；若只有部分資料則一: When the player requests data, we first check if the local Cache has the data; if so, we return it. If only partial data is available, we return that partial data as well. For example, if the local cache has 0–100 and the player requests 0–200, we return 0–100 first.
translations.播放過的音樂會在本地產生 Cache 備份\n: Played music will generate a local Cache backup
translations.播放音樂時先檢查本地有無 Cache 讀取，有則不再重伺服器要檔案\n: Check local Cache before playing music; if available, do not request the file from the server again.
translations.既上一篇「 [iOS HLS Cache 實踐方法探究之旅](../d796bf: It has been over half a year since the previous article "[iOS HLS Cache Implementation Exploration](../d796bf8e661e/)." Our team still aims to implement real-time caching during playback because it greatly impacts costs. We are a music streaming platform, and if we have to download the entire file every time the same song is played, it wastes data for both us and users without unlimited plans. Although music files are only a few MBs, small amounts add up to significant costs!
translations.最後附上研究如何實作的參考資料\n\n: Finally, references for research on implementation are provided.
translations.有了以上前導知識後我們來看實現 AVPlayer 本地 Cache 功能的原理方: With the above foundational knowledge, let's look at the principles and methods for implementing AVPlayer local cache functionality.
translations.有了檔案資訊後，會再發起第二次請求，請求從 0-總長度 的資料。\n\n: After obtaining the file information, a second request will be made to fetch data from 0 to the total length.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or suggestions, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.有這部分需求可參考大大的做法，用 FileHandle seek read/wr: For this requirement, you can refer to the author's approach using FileHandle's seek and read/write features for handling.
translations.本地 Cache 資料物件映射實現 NSCoding，因 PINCache 是依: The local Cache data object implements NSCoding because PINCache relies on the archivedData method for encoding/decoding.
translations.根據 [上一篇](../d796bf8e661e/) 的經驗，如果我們要繼續使用: Based on the experience from the [previous article](../d796bf8e661e/), if we continue to use HLS (.m3u8/.ts) to achieve the goal, things will become very complicated or even impossible. Instead, we fallback to using mp3 files, which allows direct implementation with `AVAssetResourceLoaderDelegate`.
translations.檔案資訊可由：\n\n: File information can be obtained from:
translations.此方法問我們能不能處理此資源，return true 能，return fals: This method asks if we can handle this resource. Returning true means yes, returning false means we do not handle it (unsupported URL).
translations.照線性播放只要一直 append 新 Data 到 Cache Data 中即可: For linear playback, simply appending new data to the cached data is enough. However, in reality, it's more complex. Users might play Range 0–100, then directly seek to Range 200–500; how to merge the existing 0–100 data with the new 200–500 data becomes a major challenge.
translations.當我們使用 AVURLAsset init with URL 資源並賦予給 AV: When we use AVURLAsset initialized with a URL resource and assign it to AVPlayer/AVQueuePlayer to start playback, as mentioned above, it will first use a GET Range 0–1 request to check if Range requests are supported, the total resource length, and the file type.
translations.若沒有本地 Cache、返回的資料不夠，則會發起 ResourceLoaderR: If there is no local Cache or the returned data is insufficient, a ResourceLoaderRequest will be initiated to fetch data from the network.
translations.要注意的是不是實踐了自己的 Resource Loader 他就會理你，只有當系: Note that just implementing your own Resource Loader doesn't guarantee it will be used. The system will only use your Resource Loader when it cannot recognize or handle the resource itself.
translations.要達到這個功能的方法就是透過 HTTP/1.1 Range 只返回指定資料字節範: The way to achieve this function is by using HTTP/1.1 Range to return only the specified byte range of data. For example, specifying 0–100 will return only the 100 bytes from 0 to 100. Using this method, data can be obtained in segments sequentially and then combined into a complete file. This method can also be applied to file download resume functionality.
translations.設 0 的話就不會主動刪除檔案。\n\n: Setting it to 0 means files will not be deleted automatically.
translations.請求檔案資訊時我們需要賦予這三項資訊：\n\n: When requesting file information, we need to provide these three pieces of information:
translations.這時我們就得到 Range 0–100 的 Data，可再繼續發新請求拿 Ran: At this point, we obtain Data for Range 0–100 and can continue sending new requests for Range 100–200, 200–300, and so on until completion.
translations.這邊唯一做法就只能接收變換播放目標通知，然後在收到通知後取消上一手的 AVURL: The only approach here is to listen for the playback target change notification, and upon receiving it, cancel the previous AVURLAsset loading.
translations.這邊多抽出 Protocol 因為未來可能使用其他儲存方式替代 PINCache: Here, the Protocol is extracted separately because other storage methods may replace PINCache in the future. Therefore, other code depends on the Protocol rather than the Class instance.
translations.這邊的答案是， **我們不處理非連續資料** ；因為敝專案僅為音訊，檔案也就幾: The answer here is, **we do not handle non-continuous data**; since this project is audio only and the files are just a few MB (≤ 10MB), we decided not to implement it to save development cost. I only handle merging continuous data (for example, if we currently have 0~100 and the new data is 75~200, after merging it becomes 0~200; if the new data is 150~200, I will ignore it and not merge).
There was an unexpected issue when I was observing how resources were fetched. I used the [mitmproxy](../46410aaada00/) tool to sniff the traffic, but it showed errors. It waited until the entire response was received before displaying anything, instead of showing segmented requests with persistent connections continuing the download. It really scared me! I thought iOS was so dumb that it always downloaded the whole file at once! Next time I use a tool, I need to stay a bit skeptical. Orz
translations.針對 Remote Request 的封裝，主要是服務 ResourceLoad: The encapsulation of Remote Request mainly serves the data requests initiated by the ResourceLoader.
translations.音訊加解密可在 ResourceLoaderRequest 中拿到 Data 進: Audio encryption and decryption can be done within ResourceLoaderRequest when accessing Data, and also during storage by performing encryption/decryption on the locally stored Data in AssetData's encode/decode methods.
translations.首先我們要先了解在播放影片、音樂時是怎麼跟伺服器要求資料的；一般來說影片、音樂檔: First, we need to understand how data is requested from the server when playing videos or music. Generally, video and audio files are large, so it's impossible to wait until the entire file is downloaded before starting playback. Commonly, data is fetched as playback progresses; as long as the currently playing segment's data is available, playback can proceed.
